nav.subtitle: Strategic Intelligence Feed
nav.urgency_alerts_help: Browser alerts for new high-urgency emails on this device. Requires notification permission.

inbox.hero_description: Executive-grade email distillation with integrated security monitoring.
inbox.legacy_accounts_helper: Your accounts use the old "default" system. To enable multi-account features with real email addresses and colored avatars, please disconnect and reconnect your accounts.
inbox.no_fresh_briefings_in_filter: No fresh briefings caught in the {{category}} filter.

modal.preferred_language_version_not_generated: Preferred language version not generated yet
modal.preferred_language_fallback_notice: The saved summary currently shown is in {{actualLanguage}}. Your preferred language is {{preferredLanguage}}. Generate the preferred-language version to replace this fallback view.
modal.no_translatable_body_available: No translatable body available for this email.

auth.maximum_accounts_reached: Maximum {{maxAccounts}} accounts reached. Disconnect one to add another.
auth.connect_gmail_intro: Connect your Gmail account to start your intelligence feed.
auth.authorize_access_help: Click the button below to securely authorize access.
auth.read_only_inbox_notice: Read-only INBOX access. Encrypted credentials. Disconnect anytime.
auth.connected_accounts_summary_one: You have {{count}} connected account. Click the account switcher above to select which account to view.
auth.connected_accounts_summary_other: You have {{count}} connected accounts. Click the account switcher above to select which account to view.
auth.disconnect_account_failed: Failed to disconnect {{account}}. Please try again.
auth.disconnect_account_notice: Emails from this account will no longer be synced. You can reconnect at any time.
auth.select_your_account_step_help: Use the account switcher above to activate it. Up to {{maxAccounts}} accounts.
auth.feed_syncs_automatically_help: Inbox emails appear and AI summaries generate in seconds.

settings.ai_language_help: Used for new summaries, action items, and draft replies on this account. Existing AI results stay unchanged.
settings.use_this_language_for_new_ai_results: Use This Language for New AI Results
settings.ai_language_saved_for_this_account: AI language saved for this account.
